__category_info__.description: Tools and filters for generating new 3D meshes and primitives from scratch.

create_cube.description: Create a Box, Cube, Hexahedron. You can specify the side length.

shade_smooth.name: Shade Smooth
shade_smooth.description: Render and display faces smooth, using interpolated vertex normals.

create_sphere.description: Create a Sphere, whose topology is obtained as regular subdivision of an icosahedron.

subdiv.name: Subdiv. Level
subdiv.description: Number of the recursive subdivision of the surface. Default is 3 (a sphere approximation composed by 1280 faces). Admitted values are in the range 0 (an icosahedron) to 8 (a 1.3 MegaTris approximation of a sphere)

shade_smooth.name: Shade Smooth
shade_smooth.description: Render and display faces smooth, using interpolated vertex normals.

create_sphere_cap.description: Create a Sphere Cap, or spherical dome, subtended by a cone of given angle.

angle.name: Angle
angle.description: Angle of the cone subtending the cap. It must be < 180.

subdiv.name: Subdiv. Level
subdiv.description: Number of the recursive subdivision of the surface. Default is 3 (a sphere approximation composed by 1280 faces). Admitted values are in the range 0 (an icosahedron) to 8 (a 1.3 MegaTris approximation of a sphere)

shade_smooth.name: Shade Smooth
shade_smooth.description: Render and display faces smooth, using interpolated vertex normals.

hradius.name: Horizontal Radius
hradius.description: Radius of the whole horizontal ring of the torus

vradius.name: Vertical Radius
vradius.description: Radius of the vertical section of the ring

vsubdiv.name: Vertical Subdivision
vsubdiv.description: Number of sides of the polygonal approximation of the torus section

shade_smooth.name: Shade Smooth
shade_smooth.description: Render and display faces smooth, using interpolated vertex normals.
